basic.question_text: 查询所有电影的标题及**总票房（国内+国际）**，以美元显示。
basic.question_context: domestic_sales + international_sales 计算总票房。JOIN 两个表。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, domestic_sales + international_sales AS total_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
hints: SELECT title, domestic_sales + international_sales FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
SELECT title, domestic_sales + international_sales AS total_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
SELECT title, domestic_sales + international_sales AS total_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;

basic.question_text: 查询所有电影的标题及**评分转为百分制**（rating * 10）。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, rating * 10 AS rating_percent FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
hints: rating * 10 AS rating_percent
SELECT title, rating * 10 FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
SELECT title, rating * 10 FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;

basic.question_text: 查询所有在**偶数年**发行的电影标题和年份。
basic.question_context: WHERE year % 2 = 0。% 是取模（求余）运算符。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year % 2 = 0;
hints: year % 2 = 0 表示年份能被2整除（偶数年）
SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year % 2 = 0;
SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year % 2 = 0;

basic.question_text: 查询电影标题及**片长转换为小时**（length_minutes / 60.0），保留 1 位小数。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, ROUND(length_minutes / 60.0, 1) AS hours FROM movies;
hints: ROUND(length_minutes / 60.0, 1) 将结果四舍五入到1位小数
SELECT title, ROUND(length_minutes / 60.0, 1) FROM movies;
SELECT title, ROUND(length_minutes / 60.0, 1) FROM movies;

basic.question_text: 查询电影标题及**国内票房占比**（国内/总票房），用百分比显示。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, ROUND(domestic_sales * 100.0 / (domestic_sales + international_sales), 1) AS domestic_pct FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
hints: domestic_sales * 100.0 / (domestic_sales + international_sales)
SELECT title, ROUND(domestic_sales*100.0/(domestic_sales+international_sales),1) FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id;
SELECT title, ROUND(domestic_sales*100.0/(domestic_sales+international_sales),1) FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id;

intermediate.question_text: 查询每部电影的**每分钟票房价值**（总票房 / 片长），按该值降序排列。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, (domestic_sales + international_sales) / length_minutes AS revenue_per_min FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY revenue_per_min DESC;
hints: (domestic_sales + international_sales) / length_minutes
SELECT title, (domestic_sales+international_sales)/length_minutes FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY 2 DESC;
SELECT title, (domestic_sales+international_sales)/length_minutes FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY 2 DESC;

intermediate.question_text: 查询标题和评分，同时新增一列'推荐等级'：rating >= 8.0 显示'神作'，>= 7.0 显示'佳作'，否则显示'一般'。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, rating, CASE WHEN rating >= 8.0 THEN '神作' WHEN rating >= 7.0 THEN '佳作' ELSE '一般' END AS level FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
hints: CASE WHEN rating >= 8.0 THEN '神作' WHEN rating >= 7.0 THEN '佳作' ELSE '一般' END
SELECT title, rating, CASE WHEN rating>=8.0 THEN '神作' WHEN rating>=7.0 THEN '佳作' ELSE '一般' END FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id;
SELECT title, rating, CASE WHEN rating>=8.0 THEN '神作' WHEN rating>=7.0 THEN '佳作' ELSE '一般' END FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id;

intermediate.question_text: 查询电影**片长与平均片长的差值**。正的表示比平均长，负的表示短。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, length_minutes - (SELECT AVG(length_minutes) FROM movies) AS diff FROM movies;
hints: 子查询获取平均片长
SELECT title, length_minutes - (SELECT AVG(length_minutes) FROM movies) FROM movies;
SELECT title, length_minutes - (SELECT AVG(length_minutes) FROM movies) FROM movies;

intermediate.question_text: 查询电影的发行年份是否为闰年（能被4整除但不能被100整除，或能被400整除）。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, year, CASE WHEN (year % 4 = 0 AND year % 100 != 0) OR year % 400 = 0 THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS is_leap FROM movies;
hints: (year%4=0 AND year%100!=0) OR year%400=0
SELECT title, year, CASE WHEN (year%4=0 AND year%100!=0) OR year%400=0 THEN '是' ELSE '否' END FROM movies;
SELECT title, year, CASE WHEN (year%4=0 AND year%100!=0) OR year%400=0 THEN '是' ELSE '否' END FROM movies;

intermediate.question_text: 查询每部电影标题，以及该电影的评分与所有电影平均评分的差值。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, rating, ROUND(rating - (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM boxoffice), 2) AS rating_diff FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
hints: rating - (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM boxoffice)
SELECT title, rating, ROUND(rating-(SELECT AVG(rating) FROM boxoffice),2) FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id;
SELECT title, rating, ROUND(rating-(SELECT AVG(rating) FROM boxoffice),2) FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id;

challenge.question_text: 查询**投资回报率（ROI）最高**的电影。ROI = (总票房 - 预算) / 预算。假设预算 = 片长 * 100万美元。
challenge.question_context: 总票房 = domestic_sales + international_sales，假设预算 = length_minutes * 1000000，计算 ROI。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT title, CAST((domestic_sales + international_sales - length_minutes * 1000000) AS REAL) / (length_minutes * 1000000) AS roi FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY roi DESC LIMIT 1;
hints: (总票房 - 预算) / 预算，其中预算 = length_minutes * 1000000
SELECT title, (domestic_sales+international_sales-length_minutes*1000000)*1.0/(length_minutes*1000000) AS roi FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY roi DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT title, (domestic_sales+international_sales-length_minutes*1000000)*1.0/(length_minutes*1000000) AS roi FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY roi DESC LIMIT 1;

challenge.question_text: 使用 STRFTIME 或字符串函数，查询**年份的后两位数字**（如 1995 → '95'），并统计每年发行的电影数。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT year, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY year;
accept_alternatives: SELECT year % 100 AS short_year, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY short_year;
hints: 直接 GROUP BY year 即可统计每年数量
SELECT year, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY year;
SELECT year, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY year;
